channel.title: Python on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Junho Lee

item.title: Hands-On Notebooks for the Updated LangChain Ecosystem
item.description: With LangChain’s move to v1, legacy chain code has become outdated. A repository of Korean Jupyter notebooks walks through LangGraph’s State and Node design step by step.

item.title: Automating Tedious Metric Collection with Python and GitHub Actions
item.description: Examining an automated reporting system built with Python and GitHub Actions to escape the tedium of manually checking macroeconomic indicators every day.

item.title: How Data Preprocessing Determines RAG Quality and Leveraging Markdown Conversion Tools
item.description: Examining key features of a Python-based document conversion tool released by a global IT company, and proposing efficient approaches to handling data in LLM pipelines.
